title: Basic JavaScript File Uploader
description: Write a function that demonstrates the core concepts of JavaScript File Uploader. Focus on implementing Drag and drop upload correctly.

title: Intermediate JavaScript File Uploader
description: Create a function that uses Drag and drop upload and File validation (type, size) together. Handle edge cases and validate inputs.

title: Advanced JavaScript File Uploader Project
description: Build a small application that applies Drag and drop upload, File validation (type, size), Upload progress bar in a real-world scenario. Include error handling and input validation.

title: Debugging JavaScript File Uploader
description: The following code has bugs related to Drag and drop upload. Find and fix them.

title: Refactoring JavaScript File Uploader
description: Refactor the following code to use modern JavaScript patterns with Drag and drop upload and File validation (type, size).
